events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago
events.context: Mariano turns 30 on March 19th. Weekend backpacking trip to a warm destination, then flights to Chicago for birthday celebration.
events.hook: Need to find a warm backpacking destination, book flights, and arrange REI gear rentals ASAP.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana through Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Currently planning activities and shopping for 4 pairs of eyeglasses.
events.hook: Validate eyeglasses prescription requirements and start planning activities in Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
